summary: Senior enterprise software and data engineer with 20+ years of experience building, supporting, and modernizing production systems in regulated environments. Strong background in Python, SQL, APIs, database-driven applications, production support, documentation, automation, and operational reliability. Experienced partnering with cross-functional teams, troubleshooting complex issues, writing maintainable code, and supporting secure, scalable applications and data workflows.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and supported Python and SQL-based production data workflows that ingested, validated, transformed, and reported telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints in a regulated financial-services environment.
Built automation utilities and reporting processes to reduce manual operational work, improve repeatability, and support timely decision-making for infrastructure and application stakeholders.
Troubleshot production data and reporting issues through root-cause analysis, validation checks, log review, and close collaboration with operations, application, and architecture teams.

Developed and maintained dashboards and analytical outputs for senior stakeholders using Python, SQL, Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly, emphasizing accuracy, clarity, and operational usefulness.
Supported cloud and data-platform modernization using AWS services including S3, Glue, Redshift, EC2, and ECS, while applying security, governance, access-control, and production-readiness practices.
Documented data flows, operational processes, validation logic, and support procedures to improve maintainability, handoffs, and long-term system reliability.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Supported production-facing monitoring and performance workflows for critical hospitality systems, partnering with engineering teams to diagnose application behavior and improve operational visibility.
Used Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, QLIK, SQL, and analytics techniques to identify performance trends and provide actionable recommendations to technical stakeholders.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning and monitoring readiness reviews, helping teams evaluate application supportability and performance validation needs.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as a senior technical consultant for enterprise application monitoring environments, supporting J2EE/WebLogic/WebSphere applications, production diagnostics, and operational reporting.
Built Perl and Korn Shell automation scripts for data extraction and recurring reporting, replacing manual exports and improving consistency for operational teams.
Led upgrades, technical documentation, stakeholder training, troubleshooting, and cross-team support for large-scale monitoring systems with thousands of instrumented agents.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from distributed MySQL infrastructure to Oracle RAC, validating correctness and maintaining performance for mission-critical transaction processing.
Developed C++/OCCI/OCI and SQL-based validation and testing routines to compare migrated records, verify data integrity, and support production cutover confidence.
Optimized database access patterns and transaction processing logic to reduce infrastructure footprint while maintaining sub-second query performance.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported enterprise telecom billing interfaces and application components using C, C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, SQL, Java/J2EE, XML, and Korn Shell across Unix/Linux environments.
Performed production support, troubleshooting, testing, documentation, and defect resolution for billing, reporting, and customer-management workflows.
Built and maintained database scripts, integration interfaces, and support utilities while collaborating with QA, operations, and business teams through structured SDLC processes.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python-based automation pipeline for job intake, duplicate detection, LLM-assisted scoring, artifact generation, quality gates, and application tracking. The project emphasizes structured JSON artifacts, validation, workflow automation, and repeatable delivery.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting and Analytics Engine
projects.description: Built Python and PySpark-based forecasting and reporting workflows for enterprise telemetry, including data preparation, validation, analytics dashboards, and operational insights for infrastructure planning.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed AWS data-platform patterns using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Bedrock concepts to support ETL, data access, text-to-SQL experimentation, and cost-aware analytics workflows.
